layman_headline: Extreme Fear grips crypto — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The entire crypto market is in a sharp downturn with nearly every major coin posting significant weekly losses. The Fear & Greed index is at 22 (Extreme Fear), which historically can signal good buying opportunities, but the problem is none of the available swing trade candidates have strong enough chart setups to justify risking capital right now. Most altcoins are in confirmed downtrends with bearish chart structures, and Bitcoin dominance at 56% means money is flowing away from altcoins toward Bitcoin — making alt trades even riskier.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is showing fear but hasn't given a clear technical reversal signal on any quality coin yet. Watch for oversold bounces with volume confirmation before committing capital.
expert_reasoning: In extreme fear environments, the temptation is to buy the dip, but disciplined swing trading requires a confluence of signals — not just sentiment. Every candidate has significant issues: KITE has a bullish engulfing candle but is in a confirmed downtrend with 20% 5-day momentum loss and no volume data. GRASS lacks any chart analysis or RSI data making it a blind trade. MON has low RSI (37) and a bullish marubozu but a terrible risk/reward ratio of 0.79x. BONK is the most oversold at RSI 33 but its chart bias is deeply bearish (-1.40) with a bearish marubozu — classic falling knife. JTO is the structurally strongest (above SMA20, uptrend, bias +0.40) but RSI at 59 is already mid-range meaning the bounce may already be priced in. BTC dominance at 56% further pressures all alts. The right play is to wait for a volume-confirmed reversal pattern on one of these candidates.
risk_factors: BTC at $62,520 could break below $60K triggering another leg down in alts
Bitcoin dominance at 56% and rising means alt capital is being drained systematically
No volume data available on any candidate — impossible to confirm any breakout or reversal
watch_list: BTC price action around $60,000 support — a breakdown there would crush alts further
Fear & Greed index — if it drops below 15 or reverses sharply above 30, that changes the calculus
BONK and MON RSI — if either drops below 30 with a bullish divergence candle, that would be actionable
market_context: The crypto market is in a broad risk-off environment with Extreme Fear at 22, BTC down 2.5% weekly, and most alts down 10-33% over 7 days. High BTC dominance signals capital rotation away from altcoins, making alt swing trades particularly dangerous right now.
context_banner: Extreme Fear dominates crypto markets — no quality swing setups present, disciplined patience is the optimal strategy.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 22 is historically a contrarian buy zone, but improving only marginally from 23.9 weekly average — no sharp reversal yet.
BONK (33) and MON (37) are approaching oversold but neither has confirmed a reversal pattern with bullish RSI divergence.
Bitcoin panic-selling may be ending as sellers' profit margins disappear — suggests potential BTC floor forming but no confirmation yet.
BONK chart bias is strongly bearish (-1.40) with bearish marubozu; JTO is the only slightly bullish chart (+0.40) but with poor risk/reward of 1.05x.
Stablecoin adoption news (Bolivia considering USDT, Hyundai USDT settlement) is structurally bullish for crypto but not an immediate price catalyst for trading coins.
